name: @absolutejs/audit
description: Cross-surface audit-event substrate for the AbsoluteJS ecosystem — append-only event log with pluggable sinks, optional hash-chain tamper-evidence, and live-wire helpers that thread sync mutations, queue jobs, runtime exits, and secret rotations into one unified log.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun --external @absolutejs/manifest --external @sinclair/typebox && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && absolute-manifest emit
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run build && bun publish
